description: Go module importing golang.org/x/text v0.3.7 but only using cases.Title and language.English, not the vulnerable ParseAcceptLanguage or MatchStrings functions. govulncheck finds the vulnerability at module/package level but not at function level.

findings.human_justification: govulncheck finds the vulnerability at package level but no function-level trace exists, meaning the vulnerable symbols (ParseAcceptLanguage, MatchStrings) are not called from user code.
